name: Cadiz Medallion Peel & Stick Wallpaper Beige - Opalhouse™: Removable, Self-Adhesive, Bohemian, Stain-Resistant
description:
Transform your living space into something artistic and stylish with this Cadiz Medallion Peel and Stick Removable Wallpaper from Opalhouse™. This wallpaper makes for a fantastic accent wall in your living room, office or bedroom, or can be plastered on all four walls for a striking bathroom or entryway. It self-adheres for no-mess application and lets you easily have a living space that reflects your fun, eclectic style.

This is your house. Where you create spaces as bold as your spirit. Collect objects as inspired as your dreams. Find pieces that remind you of every place you've been. Discover stories to inspire everywhere you have yet to go. This is Opalhouse™.
